description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- Support Claude plugin manifest installs / 支持 Claude 插件清单安装 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6140
- Fix quoted node eval hook autorepair / 修复 node -e hook 引号自愈 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6141
- fix(desktop): play attention sound for background prompts by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6142
- fix(desktop): re-arm the prompt chime after runtime rebuilds by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6146
- fix(desktop): order runtime:rebuilt ahead of the rebuilt controller's events by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6151
- Fix CRLF edit diagnostics / 修复 CRLF 编辑诊断 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6150
- Quiet recovery-copy notifications / 移除冲突副本横幅、toast 与转写通知 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6143
- Compact tool error details / 折叠工具错误详情 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6153
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.17.6...desktop-v1.17.7
